_comment: Maps loc IDs to total floor count for multi-floor stair traversals (top-floor / bottom-floor actions). Both the bottom and top loc IDs of a staircase pair should be listed with the same floor count.
_format: locId (string) -> total floors (number). e.g. 3 floors = planes 0,1,2 so top-floor from 0 -> 2, bottom-floor from 2 -> 0.
